task_completion.description: Verify the desktopSharingFrameRate is set to min 15 and max 30.

task_completion.description: Verify enableLayerSuspension is set to true.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js with 'enableLayerSuspension: true'.

task_completion.description: Verify Jitsi Meet services were restarted using docker compose.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'docker compose restart', 'docker-compose restart', or 'docker compose down' followed by 'docker compose up -d' in the Jitsi deployment directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the system health was checked after restart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of a command like 'docker ps' or 'docker compose ps' with the Jitsi containers listed as 'Up' or 'healthy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report file was created confirming the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the creation or contents of '/home/ga/fps_config_report.txt' with text confirming the FPS and layer suspension changes.

integrity.description: Ensure the correct configuration file was modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path shown in the editor or terminal commands must explicitly be '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js'.

integrity.description: Ensure docker commands were actually executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should show the actual output of the docker compose commands (e.g., 'Restarting...', 'Started', or container status lists), not just the typed commands without execution.

integrity.description: Ensure the report file was actually saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or editor should show evidence of saving the file to '/home/ga/fps_config_report.txt', such as a successful save message in nano/vim or a successful echo/tee command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js. The target settings are desktopSharingFrameRate with min: 15 and max: 30, and enableLayerSuspension: true. The report must be located at /home/ga/fps_config_report.txt.
